/opt/rocm-7.1.1/lib/llvm/bin/clang++  --offload-arch=gfx90a --hip-link --rtlib=compiler-rt -unwindlib=libgcc -Xlinker --dependency-file=CMakeFiles/smokeParticles.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/smokeParticles.dir/GLSLProgram.cpp.o CMakeFiles/smokeParticles.dir/ParticleSystem.cpp.o CMakeFiles/smokeParticles.dir/ParticleSystem_cuda.hip.o CMakeFiles/smokeParticles.dir/SmokeRenderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/smokeParticles.dir/SmokeShaders.cpp.o CMakeFiles/smokeParticles.dir/framebufferObject.cpp.o CMakeFiles/smokeParticles.dir/particleDemo.cpp.o CMakeFiles/smokeParticles.dir/renderbuffer.cpp.o -o smokeParticles  -Wl,-rpath,/home/jchen/cuda-port-agent/hip/build/stubs stubs/libGL.so stubs/libGLU.so stubs/libglut.so /opt/rocm-7.1.1/lib/libamdhip64.so.7.1.70101 /opt/rocm-7.1.1/lib/libamdhip64.so.7.1.70101 -lgcc -lgcc
